projects.name: Lexi
projects.description: A code understanding and Q&A agent that ingests a codebase via GitHub ZIP, summarizes all files in batches, and exposes tools to query and find relevant files. Essentially a RAG system over codebases. Planning to extend it into a full coding agent.

projects.name: OCR Pipeline
projects.description: A robust document OCR pipeline that accepts documents in any format and extracts text accurately using Nemotron Parse and GLM-OCR. Focus on vision models and multimodal document understanding.
